# Relative speed comparison

## Short Teaching Summary
Relative speed comparison: Velocity is related to distance and time; the tight end travels twice the distance of the lineman in the same time, making the tight end twice as fast. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
